global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with geometric shapes and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Encourages users to engage with trending content and make an order.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the background, creating a vibrant and engaging atmosphere.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one oval and one rectangle, are centered in the ad, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text at the top reads 'Watch what's trending', clearly visible against the purple background.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline states 'Start free today', providing additional information.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent white button with the text 'Order now' invites user interaction.

elements.label: MoonScreen logo
elements.description: The logo 'MoonScreen' appears in the top left corner, styled in a clean, modern font.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label in the top left corner reads 'UGC', indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: A smaller decorative shape is positioned in the center, enhancing the visual appeal.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An unspecified element that may contain additional visual details or branding.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: Another unspecified element that adds to the overall design but lacks clear identification.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A third unspecified element that contributes to the layout without a defined role.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small element at the top right that may contain additional branding or information.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The main message text 'Watch what's trending Order now' is prominently displayed at the bottom.

elements.label: MoonScreen logo
elements.description: The logo 'MoonScreen' appears in a clean, modern font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label indicating user-generated content, positioned at the top.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, modern and vibrant, key elements include geometric shapes and clear CTAs.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Watch what's trending, Start free today, Order now, MoonScreen, UGC
